# RefearnApp

> Self-hostable, open-source affiliate management and tracking software designed for modern indie hackers and B2B SaaS platforms.

## Core Information
- [RefearnApp Homepage](https://refearnapp.com/): The main landing page outlining features, data sovereignty advantages, and self-hosting capabilities.
- [Documentation](https://refearnapp.com/docs): Comprehensive guides on how to install, configure, and self-host RefearnApp via Docker or dynamic environments.
- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/ZAK123DSFDF/refearnapp): The official open-source repository for RefearnApp setup, tracking scripts, and contribution guidelines.

## Features & Ecosystem
- [Pricing & Self-Hosting](https://refearnapp.com/#pricing): Overview of our open-source license, community support, and managed hosting alternatives—including our lifetime deal (one-time payment) tier.
- [Pricing & Self-Hosting](https://refearnapp.com/#pricing): Overview of our open-source license, community support, and managed hosting alternatives—including our lifetime deal (one-time payment) tier.

## Optional
- [Blog](https://refearnapp.com/blog): Insights on building in public, bootstrapping B2B software, and optimizing affiliate marketing channels.
